title: Verify existing implementation of isTokenExpired
description: The `isTokenExpired(token: string): boolean` function already exists in `src/auth/token-utils.ts` and its tests exist in `src/auth/token-utils.test.ts`. The implementation decodes JWT by splitting on '.', base64url-decodes the payload, and checks if `exp < now`. Tests cover valid non-expired tokens (false), expired tokens (true), and malformed tokens (true).
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts - JwtService with base64url encoding/decoding and TokenPayload type
src/utils/*.ts - Single-function utility files with co-located .test.ts tests
